title: Building Blocks
storySnippet: Deeper in the courtyard, Princess Lira discovers that strong ideas are built from strong words.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Solar panels ___ electricity from sunlight, making them useful for powering homes.
data.definition: Generate: to produce or create something, especially energy, ideas, or results.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Every student can ___ to the class garden by planting seeds or pulling weeds.
data.definition: Contribute: to give something, such as time, effort, or resources, to help achieve a goal.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The diagram will ___ how the water cycle works from evaporation to rainfall.
data.definition: Illustrate: to explain or make something clear by using examples, pictures, or diagrams.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Understanding fractions is a ___ skill needed for success in higher-level math.
data.definition: Fundamental: forming the base or foundation; essential and important.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The team made ___ progress over the season, winning twice as many games as last year.
data.definition: Substantial: large in size, amount, or importance; considerable.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Over time, fallen leaves ___ on the forest floor and become rich soil.
data.definition: Accumulate: to gather or collect gradually over a period of time.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Homework assignments ___ a large part of the final grade in this class.
data.definition: Constitute: to make up or form a whole; to be a component or part of something.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Reading books from different cultures gives you a wider ___ on the world.
data.definition: Perspective: a particular way of viewing or thinking about something; a point of view.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: In the ___ weeks after the volcano erupted, scientists closely monitored the area.
data.definition: Subsequent: coming after something in time or order; following.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Oak trees are the ___ species in this forest, outnumbering all other types.
data.definition: Predominant: most common, widespread, or having the greatest influence.
